raw_consumer_statement:
Issue : Credit card dispute improperly denied Company : Citibank , N.A . 
Product : Credit card Problem : Billing dispute unauthorized charges What happened I disputed a couple unauthorized charges on my Citi credit card that were processed through XXXX. Citi denied my dispute and stated that I had conversations or communications with XXXX and/or Citi regarding these transactions. I did not have any such conversations. The information Citi relied on is incorrect and does not reflect my actions. 
Citis investigation appears to have used inaccurate or misattributed merchant data. I have repeatedly informed Citi that I did not authorize these transactions and did not communicate with XXXX or Citi about them. Despite this, Citi closed the dispute without providing any of the evidence they claim supports their decision. 

What I am requesting I am requesting that the CFPB require Citi to : 1. Conduct a proper reinvestigation under the Fair Credit Billing Act. 
XXXX. Provide all documentation Citi relied on in denying my dispute, including : Merchant logs XXXX communication records Any alleged conversations attributed to ME 3. Correct any inaccurate or fraudulent information used in the investigation. 
XXXX. Reverse the unauthorized charges if Citi can not prove they were authorized by ME.
